# Frontend instructions

- Use TypeScript
- Prefer simple functional components
- Keep components small and composable
- Use shared contracts/schemas where appropriate
- Mobile app is React Native + Expo
- Web app is React
- Gardener/client UX is mobile-first
- Admin UX is web-first
- Do not force the same UI across mobile and web
- Handle loading, error, and empty states
- Keep forms straightforward and validated
